Package org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena

Class RdfSerializer

java.lang.Object
org.apache.juneau.marshall.Context
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingContextable
org.apache.juneau.marshall.MarshallingTraverseContext
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.Serializer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.serializer.WriterSerializer
org.apache.juneau.marshall.jena.RdfSerializer
All Implemented Interfaces:
Function<Object,String>, ThrowingFunction<Object,String>, RdfMetaProvider, XmlMetaProvider
Direct Known Subclasses:
JsonLdSerializer, N3Serializer, NQuadsSerializer, NTripleSerializer, RdfJsonSerializer, RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer, RdfXmlSerializer, TriGSerializer, TriXSerializer, TurtleSerializer
public class RdfSerializer extends WriterSerializer implements RdfMetaProvider
Serializes POJOs to RDF.
Behavior-specific subclasses

The following direct subclasses are provided for language-specific serializers:

  • RdfXmlSerializer - RDF/XML.
  • RdfXmlAbbrevSerializer - RDF/XML-ABBREV.
  • NTripleSerializer - N-TRIPLE.
  • TurtleSerializer - TURTLE.
  • N3Serializer - N3.
Notes:
  • This class is thread safe and reusable.
See Also:
  • {doc jmr.RdfDetails}

    • create

      public static RdfSerializer.Builder<?> create()
      Creates a new builder for this object.

      A new builder.

    • copy

      public RdfSerializer.Builder<?> copy()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Creates a builder from this context object.

      Builders are used to define new contexts (e.g. serializers, parsers) based on existing configurations.

      Overrides:
      copy in class WriterSerializer
      Returns:
      A new Builder object.

    • createSession

      public RdfSerializerSession.Builder createSession()
      Description copied from class: Context
      Create a session builder based on the properties defined on this context.

      Use this method for creating sessions where you want to override basic settings. Otherwise, use Context.getSession() directly.

      Overrides:
      createSession in class WriterSerializer
      Returns:
      A new session builder.

    • getSession

      public RdfSerializerSession getSession()
      Description copied from class: Context

      Note that subclasses may opt to return a reusable non-modifiable session.

      Returns:
      A new session object.

    • isAddBeanTypes

      protected final boolean isAddBeanTypes()
      Add "_type" properties when needed.
      Overrides:
      isAddBeanTypes in class Serializer
      Returns:
      true if "_type" properties will be added to beans if their type cannot be inferred through reflection.
      See Also:
      • Serializer.Builder.addBeanTypes()

    • isAddLiteralTypes

      protected final boolean isAddLiteralTypes()
      Add XSI data types to non-String literals.
      Returns:
      true if XSI data types should be added to string literals.
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.addLiteralTypes()

    • isAddRootProp

      protected final boolean isAddRootProp()
      Add RDF root identifier property to root node.
      Returns:
      true if RDF property http://www.apache.org/juneau/root is added with a value of "true" to identify the root node in the graph.
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.addRootProperty()

    • isAutoDetectNamespaces

      protected final boolean isAutoDetectNamespaces()
      Auto-detect namespace usage.
      Returns:
      true if namespaces usage should be detected before serialization.
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.disableAutoDetectNamespaces()

    • isLooseCollections

      protected final boolean isLooseCollections()
      Collections should be serialized and parsed as loose collections.
      Returns:
      true if collections of resources are handled as loose collections of resources in RDF instead of resources that are children of an RDF collection (e.g. Sequence, Bag).
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.looseCollections()

    • isUseXmlNamespaces

      protected final boolean isUseXmlNamespaces()
      Reuse XML namespaces when RDF namespaces not specified.
      Returns:
      true if namespaces defined using @XmlNs and @Xml will be inherited by the RDF serializers.
      Otherwise, namespaces will be defined using @RdfNs and @Rdf.
      See Also:
      • RdfSerializer.Builder.disableUseXmlNamespaces()
